arts.ttl: Donyell Malen reveals Aston Villa text messages which helped to seal his transfer
arts.sum: New Aston Villa signing Donyell Malen has revealed that compatriot and his reunited teammate Ian Maatsen helped to sell the transfer to the forward after delivering a glowing assessment of the club he himself only joined in the summer transfer window. Having been in England with Arsenal previously, spending a couple of years in the Gunners' academy under Arsene Wenger, it's a 'dream come true' for the Dutchman to make a return to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Everton 'in the hunt' with Sunderland, Sheffield United for £10m international striker
arts.sum: Everton are reportedly in the race to re-sign forward Tom Cannon, who is also attracting interest from the likes of Sunderland and Sheffield United.

arts.ttl: Tottenham and Everton need to pay $20m if they want midfielder, source at Brazilian club shares
arts.sum: Everton and Tottenham will need at least $20m if they wish to sign Richard Ríos from Palmeiras this month. That’s according to Caracol Radio and AS Colombia, who both cover the Colombian midfielder today. arts.ttl: Report: Everton now keen to sign £7.5m forward whose agent is actually the brother of David Moyes
Everton, Leicester City 'put off' swoop for Premier League defender by eye-catching asking price
arts.sum: Southampton are reportedly demanding £7m for the services of Kyle Walker-Peters, with Everton and Leicester currently unwilling to pay such a fee for the defender.

arts.ttl: Donyell Malen’s first words as an Aston Villa player following move from Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Donyell Malen became Aston Villa's first January signing yesterday as he joined from Dortmund for a fee believed to be in the region of €25 million.

arts.ttl: Loic Badé to Aston Villa transfer twist as Monchi claim ‘categorically denied’ by Sevilla director
arts.sum: Sevilla director of football Victor Orta is said to have ‘categorically denied’ Aston Villa transfer chief Monchi visiting the Spanish club for transfer talks. But Estadio Deportivo report Orta ‘categorically denied’ that Monchi had been at Sevilla’s HQ for talks over Badé.

arts.ttl: Claims of Aston Villa-Sevilla defender swap deal rejected
arts.sum: Speculation surrounding a potential exchange deal being on the cards between La Liga outfit Sevilla and their counterparts at Aston Villa has today been firmly shut down. This comes amid…

arts.ttl: Aston Villa will be without five players for Everton as Unai Emery makes David Moyes admission
arts.sum: The latest from the Aston Villa camp ahead of their Premier League trip to Everton tonight

arts.ttl: Manager pretty much confirms player signing for Aston Villa – ‘Source of price’ for all involved
arts.sum: Kasımpaşa manager Hakan Keleş has spoken to the Turkish media ahead of Yasin Özcan’s pending transfer to Aston Villa and has shared his pride over the youngster heading to England. The 18-year-old is on the verge of signing for the Premier League side following reports Kasımpaşa and Aston Villa have come to an agreement.
